title: Self Adhesive Wallpaper Floral Leaves Flowers 44cmX300cm PVC Vinyl Wall Paper Sticker Decoration Modern Furniture Film
features: Decorative Self-Adhesive Wallpaper: We are a factory store, providing customers with hundreds of wallpaper designs to meet the preferences of different customers. There is always one that can satisfy you.For first-time purchasers, it is recommended to purchase one roll, and after the trial is satisfied, purchase the required number of rolls.

High Quality: It is printed with environmentally friendly pigments, and is covered with durable Polyvinyl Chloride Vinyle Film and thickened paper, which makes the wallpaper pattern bright, clear lines, high contrast, strong texture, and invest the small budget to complete a large design decoration program.

Installation Is Simple And Quick: The back comes with adhesive, no need to buy additional glue; the grid lines on the back are easy to cut, just PEEL and STICK! Three sizes for you to choose: 44cmX300cm/roll, 44cmX600cm/roll, 44cmX1000cm/roll. For larger areas, you only need to purchase multiple rolls for splicing.

Easy To Take Care And Remove: The wallpaper is waterproof, oil-proof, and moisture-proof. If there is any stain, just wipe it off. If you want to remove the wallpaper, just tear it off without leaving traces of glue.

Multiple Uses: This wallpaper can cover any flat and clean surface. You can post wherever you want. There are only places you can't think of, and nothing you can't do. Not just walls, closets, wardrobes, cabinets, dressers, bookshelves, stairs, bedside tables, drawers.
description: myforHD has a good reputation and is loved by customers. We have more than 10 years of experience in the production and sales of wallpapers. Our wallpaper styles are diverse and unique in design. We hope customers will like it. Three sizes for you to choose: Size1: 44cmX300cm(0.44m/1.45ft wide, 3m/9.8ft long)=1.32sq.m(14.2sq.ft) Size2: 44cmX600cm(0.44m/1.42ft wide, 6m/19.6ft long)=2.64sq.m(27.8sq.ft) Size3: 44cmX1000cm(0.44m/1.42ft wide, 10m/32.7ft long)=4.4sq.m(46.4sq.ft) Q: How to calculate how many rolls I need to buy? A: Suppose the length of the wall is A meter, the width is B meters, A times B equals C; the length of the wallpaper we sell is D meters, the width is E meters, and D times E equals F, then the value of C divided by F is the number of rolls you need to buy. Highlights of myforHD Wallpaper 1. Peel and stick, no need to buy additional glue 2. Thick PVC film, waterproof, easy to clean, and removable 3. Environmentally friendly pigment printing, safe and non-toxic 4. From the factory directly to the customer, the price is affordable User's Guidance 1. Dust and water stains will seriously affect the effect of pasting, so make sure the surface is clean and dry before pasting. 2. Not suitable for uneven walls, For first-time purchasers, it is recommended to purchase one roll, and after the trial is satisfied, purchase the required number of rolls. 3. Gently attach the wallpaper to the surface, and after making sure that it is correct, slowly apply pressure from the middle to both sides to stick firmly 4. Paste error, need to tear off and re-paste, be sure to gently and slowly. It is not recommended to tear it off and re-paste it About Us If you are not satisfied with our wallpapers, be sure to contact us by email. We will do our best to help you solve the problem.
